tool_name: Helical Torsion Spring Design — Bending Stress, Angular Deflection & Fatigue Life

options.label: Music wire ASTM A228 — E=206 GPa, Su=2060/d^0.163 MPa
Hard-drawn MB ASTM A227 — E=196 GPa, Su=1510/d^0.201 MPa
Chrome-silicon SAE 9254 — E=203 GPa, Su=1960/d^0.108 MPa
Stainless 302/304 ASTM A313 — E=193 GPa, Su=1867/d^0.146 MPa

formulas: C = mean_coil_diameter_mm / wire_diameter_mm; K_i = (4*C*C - C - 1) / (4*C*(C-1))   // [dimensionless] Spring Index (C) & Wahl Correction Factor (K_i) Reference: SAE HS-795 §7.3 — inner surface correction: K_i = (4C²−C−1)/(4C(C−1)); valid for C = 3–12

sigma_b_mpa = K_i * 32 * torque_Nm * 1000 / (Math.PI * Math.pow(wire_diameter_mm, 3))   // [MPa] Maximum Bending Stress in Wire (σ_b) Reference: DIN 2088 §5 / ISO 26909 — σ_b = K_i · 32T / πd³; bending dominates in torsion springs

const SU_params = {A228:[2060,0.163], A227:[1510,0.201], '9254':[1960,0.108], A313:[1867,0.146]}; const p = SU_params[wire_material]; Su_mpa = p[0] / Math.pow(wire_diameter_mm, p[1])   // [MPa] Material Ultimate Tensile Strength (S_u) Reference: ASTM material strength curves — SAE HS-795 Table 1; Su = A/d^m (d in mm)

sigma_allow_mpa = 0.78 * Su_mpa; SF_s = sigma_allow_mpa / sigma_b_mpa   // [dimensionless, MPa] Static Safety Factor (SF_s) & Allowable Bending Stress Reference: SAE HS-795 §7.6 — static allowable: σ_allow = 0.78·S_u for torsion springs (bending mode)

const E_map = {A228:206000, A227:196000, '9254':203000, A313:193000}; E_mpa = E_map[wire_material]; R_T_Nm_deg = E_mpa * Math.PI * Math.pow(wire_diameter_mm, 4) / (3667 * mean_coil_diameter_mm * num_active_coils); T_calc_Nm = R_T_Nm_deg * angular_deflection_deg   // [N·m/°, N·m] Angular Spring Rate (R_T) & Stiffness Check Reference: DIN 2088 — R_T = Ed⁴/(3667·D_m·N_a) in N·m/°; E in MPa, d,D_m in mm

Se_mpa = (fatigue_cycles >= 1e7) ? 0.45 * Su_mpa : 0.45 * Su_mpa * Math.pow(fatigue_cycles / 1e7, -0.085); SF_f = Se_mpa / sigma_b_mpa   // [dimensionless, MPa] Fatigue Endurance Safety Factor (SF_f) Reference: SAE HS-795 §8 — fatigue allowable: S_e = 0.45·S_u at 10⁷ cycles; slope −0.085 for finite life

V1.error_msg: Spring index C outside 3–16: C < 3 causes severe coiling stress; C > 16 causes tangling — redesign with D_m/d ratio in 4–12 range

V2.error_msg: Static safety factor < 1.0: wire will yield at applied torque — increase wire diameter, reduce torque, or use higher-strength material

V3.error_msg: Torque mismatch > 20%: spring geometry inconsistent with required torque at given deflection — verify N_a, θ, and T inputs

smart_warnings.message: Fatigue safety factor < 1.2: spring fatigue failure likely before target life — increase wire diameter, reduce stress ratio, or apply shot peening (+20% endurance)
Static SF < 1.5: marginal — spring may take permanent set under peak torque; consider SF ≥ 2.0 for critical applications per SAE HS-795 §7.6
Bending stress > 90% of UTS: spring operating near material limit — significant risk of brittle fracture; redesign with larger wire or lower C
SS wire at high stress: austenitic stainless has lower fatigue limit than music wire — consider Elgiloy or 17-7PH for high-cycle SS applications
Deflection approaching coil binding: spring may bind before reaching full deflection — verify body length and free-length tolerance
